title: Verified app shell and admin recovery
changes: Rebuilt HTML app shell to restore content rendering and link clickability.
Moved embedded runtime data to a script[type=application/json] block and reduced oversized data:image fallback payloads in the UI copy.
Added working candidate review buttons for approved, needs_more_evidence and rejected states.
Added persistent project connection settings in Admin with endpoint test and settings export.
Kept all canonical data files intact and preserved all 476 items, 382 sources, 10 families and 5 needs_review families.
safeguards: No direct browser publication to items.json
Canonical JSON files remain source of truth
